description: A hotel guest has used the valet parking service and the charge needs to be added to their room bill.

nodes.task_description: Identify the guest's account using their vehicle's license plate or valet ticket number.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the guest's room and folio.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the standard daily rate for valet parking.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the correct parking fee.

nodes.task_description: Post the parking charge to the guest's folio.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully adds the charge to the guest's bill.
